retro.notes: All 6 requirements are fully satisfied. The shared path-match helper cleanly addresses nested-path matching (R1), boundary safety (R2), and root-level regression preservation (R3) via the (^|/) regex pattern. Extension and naming constraints (R4, R5) are retained verbatim in every modified match() body. Coverage audit (R6) is enforced by two independent filesystem-scan assertions and documented in a README artifact. Unplanned changes fall into two categories: (1) auto-generated documentation regenerations across docs/ and README.md, which are substantial in volume but are expected SDD finalize-pipeline artifacts; (2) SDD workflow tracking files under specs/. Additionally, review.md records three APPROVED suggestions (rename hasPathPrefix, merge duplicate import statements, merge test audit arrays) that were not implemented — these remain open improvement opportunities but do not affect requirement compliance or correctness.
